THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACLEAN, PETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2113 BRODERICK STREET, STAYED UNTIL OCT-30-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.

ALSO PRESENT, DEFT. PETER MACLEAN WITH ATTY ANDREW DIMITRIOU. CASE SETTLE ON THE RECORD. STIPULATION OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT. AGREES TO VACATE THE PREMISE AT 2113 BRODERICK ST. S. F, CA. ON OR BEFORE 11/26/01 BY 5 PM. IF DEFT. DEFAULTS, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTER; HOWEVER, IF DEFT. COMPLIES, A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WILL BE FILE BY THE PLTF.
